name: SPARK.Containers.Formal.Hashed_Maps

documentation.description:
Contracts in this unit are meant for analysis only, not for run-time
checking.

simple_types.name: Map
simple_types.code:
type Map (Capacity : Count_Type; Modulus : Pos_Hash_Type) is private with
  Iterable                  => (First       => First,
                                Next        => Next,
                                Has_Element => Has_Element,
                                Element     => Key),
  Default_Initial_Condition => Is_Empty (Map),
  Aggregate                 => (Empty     => Empty_Map,
                                Add_Named => Insert),
  Annotate                  =>
    (GNATprove, Container_Aggregates, "From_Model");

record_types.name: Cursor

subtypes.name: Pos_Hash_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Pos_Hash_Type is Hash_Type range 1 .. Hash_Type'Last;

subprograms.name: Copy

documentation.description:
Copy returns a container stricty equal to Source. It must have the same
cursors associated with each element. Therefore:
- capacity=0 means use Source.Capacity as capacity of target
- the modulus cannot be changed.

subprograms.name: Exclude
subprograms.code: procedure Exclude (Container : in out Map; Key : Key_Type)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
If Key is not in Container, nothing is changed

Otherwise, Key is removed from Container

Other keys are preserved

Mapping from cursors to keys is preserved

parameters.name: Key
parameters.description:
If Key is not in Container, nothing is changed

Otherwise, Key is removed from Container

Other keys are preserved

Mapping from cursors to keys is preserved

subprograms.name: Find
subprograms.code: function Find (Container : Map; Key : Key_Type) return Cursor

documentation.returns:
If Key is not contained in Container, Find returns No_Element

Otherwise, Find returns a valid cursor in Container

The key designated by the result of Find is Key

subprograms.name: Include

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
If Key is already in Container, Key is mapped to New_Item

Cursors are preserved

The key equivalent to Key in Container is replaced by Key

Elements associated with other keys are preserved

Otherwise, Key is inserted in Container

Other keys are preserved

Key is inserted in Container

Mapping from cursors to keys is preserved

parameters.description:

Elements associated with other keys are preserved

Otherwise, Key is inserted in Container

Otherwise, Key is inserted in Container and Inserted is set to True

formals.name: Equivalent_Keys

documentation.description:
Logical equality cannot be safely executed on most element or key
types. Thus, this package should only be instantiated with ghost code
disabled. This is enforced by having a special imported procedure
Check_Or_Fail that will lead to link-time errors otherwise.
